title: citrus × nobilis var. voangasay
intro: Citrus × nobilis var. voangasay, also known as the 'Papeda' or Voatsiperifery, is a variety of the Citrus nobilis plant, specifically the stem and bark of which is used for medicinal purposes. The plant contains limonoids, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Citrus × nobilis var. voangasay include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as providing relief from fever and respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional Malagasy medicine.
